samples.xml_description:
<module id="freq_div">
    <description>Frequency Divider for generating 50MHz, 10MHz, and 1MHz clocks from a 100MHz input clock.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK_in">Input clock signal.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal.</input>
        <output id="CLK_50">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 2.</output>
        <output id="CLK_10">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 10.</output>
        <output id="CLK_1">Output clock signal with a frequency of CLK_in divided by 100.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Counter for CLK_50 generation
        reg [2:0] cnt_50;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                cnt_50 <= 3'd0;
            end else begin
                cnt_50 <= cnt_50 + 1;
            end
        end
        
        // Generate CLK_50 based on cnt_50
        assign CLK_50 = (cnt_50 == 3'd4) ? ~CLK_50 : CLK_50;
        
        // Counter for CLK_10 generation
        reg [3:0] cnt_10;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                cnt_10 <= 4'd0;
            end else begin
                if (cnt_10 == 4'd9) begin
                    cnt_10 <= 4'd0;
                end else begin
                    cnt_10 <= cnt_10 + 1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Generate CLK_10 based on cnt_10
        assign CLK_10 = (cnt_10 == 4'd4) ? ~CLK_10 : CLK_10;
        
        // Counter for CLK_1 generation
        reg [6:0] cnt_100;
        always @(posedge CLK_in or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                cnt_100 <= 7'd0;
            end else begin
                if (cnt_100 == 7'd99) begin
                    cnt_100 <= 7'd0;
                end else begin
                    cnt_100 <= cnt_100 + 1;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Generate CLK_1 based on cnt_100
        assign CLK_1 = (cnt_100 == 7'd49) ? ~CLK_1 : CLK_1;
    </implementation>
</module>
